# NEXO runtime core

This repository contains the local runtime core that powers NEXO Desktop (v7.38.7).

NEXO Desktop is the public product, installer, update channel, onboarding
surface, settings UI, and support path. The local NEXO runtime provides memory,
automation, Deep Sleep, Skills, Watchdog, followups, diagnostics, and MCP
tooling inside the Desktop product.

Legacy `nexo-brain` package and binary names remain only for install/update
compatibility. They are not a separate product line.

## Public Product

- Website: https://nexo-desktop.com/
- Downloads and updates: https://nexo-desktop.com/downloads/
- Support path: NEXO Desktop

## Runtime Contract

v7.38.7: Desktop runtime public release alignment plus Evolution support-ticket mode. Public metadata, ClawHub, OpenClaw, and managed MCP release locks are aligned with NEXO Desktop while compatibility package names remain in place.

- Public product: NEXO Desktop
- Runtime role: local NEXO core bundled with Desktop
- Active systems: local memory, Deep Sleep, Evolution support-ticket mode,
  Skills, Watchdog, followups, diagnostics, and MCP tooling
- Evolution mode: enabled by default for Desktop-managed installs; it never
  opens GitHub branches, pushes, PRs, transcripts, local databases, or raw
  private evidence, and routes product-improvement requests through sanitized
  support tickets

For product information, billing, support, and installers, use
https://nexo-desktop.com/.
